title: rubus pubescens
intro: Rubus pubescens, also known as the dwarf or stoloniferous raspberry, is a species of raspberry plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The leaves of the Rubus pubescens plant have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and are said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Rubus pubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional cooking and baking.
